forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the south. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the north. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning frost near the coast. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. The chance of frost near the eastern border in the early morning. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning frost. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloud clearing. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning frost east of Ceduna. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning frost. The chance of morning fog near the east coast. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the evening.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Patches of morning frost south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Woomera in the morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
